problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: The key to Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? is Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial — specifically Photonic bandgap manipulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
